Title: User receives location suggestions based on weather and history
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Data: Current weather conditions, user's visit history
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Navigate to the main screen
3. Verify that the application suggests locations based on current weather and user history
Expected Result: The application displays suggested locations that match the current weather and user's visit history

Title: User can view suggested locations on a map
Test Steps:
1. From the main screen, navigate to the map view
2. Verify that the suggested locations are displayed on the map
Expected Result: The suggested locations are correctly displayed on the map

Title: User can modify frequency of receiving location suggestions
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the settings page
2. Modify the frequency of receiving location suggestions
3. Save the changes
Expected Result: The application updates the user's preference settings and reflects the modified frequency of receiving location suggestions

Title: User can interact with AI to select a place
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the AI interaction page
2. Provide responses to the AI questions
3. Verify that the AI selects a place based on the user's responses
Expected Result: The AI selects a place based on the user's responses and displays it to the user

Title: Application provides simple and user-friendly interface
Preconditions: User is logged into the application
Test Steps:
1. Open the application
2. Verify that the interface is minimalistic and easy to use
Expected Result:
The application presents a simple and user-friendly interface
Ingegneria del Software 2023/24 – docente: prof. Agostino Cortesi
Note: Some test cases were skipped as they did not provide enough detail to create valid test steps and expected results. For example, the glossary definitions and document structure were not included in the test cases. <|assistant|> PROJECT OVERVIEW:
This project is an application that allows users to discover nearby places of interest based on weather conditions, user history, and preferences. The application provides suggestions, displays them on a map, allows users to modify their preferences, and interacts with an AI to select a place based on user responses. The application aims for simplicity and a good user experience.

Title: Accesso pagina suggerimenti
Test Steps: 1. Vengono visualizzati i luoghi suggeriti, l’utente può scorrere tra i vari suggerimenti
Expected Result: L’utente visualizza i luoghi suggeriti e la mappa

Title: Accesso schermata dettagliata
Test Steps:
1. Vengono visualizzate informazioni dettagliate sul luogo selezionato
2. Viene visualizzato il luogo su una mappa
3. L’utente può modificare le proprie preferenze premendo il tasto “visitato” e i tasti like e dislike
4. L’utente può chiamare il numero di telefono del luogo
Expected Result: Vengono visualizzati dettagli aggiuntivi su un luogo e la sua posizione su una mappa

Title: Apertura pagina Yelp su browser
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dettagliata di uno dei luoghi
Test Steps:
1. Viene aperto il browser di sistema
2. Viene caricata e visualizzata la pagina web del luogo
Expected Result: L’utente visualizza la pagina Yelp del luogo sul proprio browser

Title: Chiamata al luogo
Preconditions:
1. Aver aperto la pagina dettagliata di uno dei luoghi
2. Il luogo ha un numero di telefono
Test Steps: 1. Viene avviata una chiamata al numero di telefono del luogo
Expected Result: L’utente telefona al numero del luogo

Title: Visualizza suggerimenti
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti
Test Steps:
1. Visualizza i luoghi suggeriti
2. L’utente può scorrere tra i vari suggerimenti
Expected Result: L’utente visualizza i luoghi suggeriti

Title: Visualizza mappa
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti o la pagina dettagliata di un luogo
Test Steps:
1. Visualizza una mappa, con segnate la posizione dell’utente e la posizione del luogo suggerito
2. L’utente può interagire con la mappa
Expected Result: L’utente visualizza la mappa

Title: Apertura mappa di sistema
Preconditions: Aver aperto una delle pagine che visualizza la mappa
Test Steps:
1. Viene aperta l’applicazione delle mappe di sistema
2. Il luogo suggerito è già impostato come destinazione
Expected Result: Viene aperta la mappa di sistema

Title: Accesso pagina impostazioni
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti (pagina principale)
Test Steps:
1. Viene aperta la pagina delle impostazione
2. Viene visualizzata una lista delle preferenze dell’utente
3. L’utente ha la possibilità di modificare le proprie preferenze
Expected Result:
L’utente visualizza la pagina delle impostazioni

Title: Access Pathfinder System
Preconditions: User has opened the suggestions page (main page).
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Pathfinder" button located to the right of the header.
2. Answer questions related to the user's preferences.
3. A suggested location is displayed.
Expected Result: The user accesses the Pathfinder system and sees a suggested location.

Title: Display Question
Preconditions: User has accessed the Pathfinder page and started a session.
Test Steps: 1. Display a question related to the user's preferences.
Expected Result: The user sees a question related to their preferences.

Title: Select Answer
Test Steps:
1. Display possible answers.
2. Select the desired answer.
Expected Result: The user selects the desired answer.

Title: Display Suggestion
Preconditions: The user has answered the questions related to their preferences.
Test Steps: 1. Display the suggested location.
Expected Result:
The user sees the suggested location from the Pathfinder system.

User can modify their preferences and view them. The system also suggests places based on user preferences and allows users to navigate to these places using a navigation system. The application aims to provide a seamless experience for users to explore suggested locations and adjust their preferences as needed.

Title: Verify the application shows a simple interface
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Observe the number of components displayed
3. Check if the interface simplifies interactions for first-time users
Expected Result: The application should display a minimalistic interface with a small number of components, making it easy for first-time users to interact with.

Title: Verify the application responds within 2 seconds
Test Steps:
1. Perform any action in the application (e.g., search for a location)
2. Measure the time taken for the response
Expected Result: The application should respond within 2 seconds.

Title: Verify the application handles errors gracefully
Test Steps:
1. Introduce a communication error (e.g., simulate network failure)
2. Introduce an error in algorithm execution
3. Perform operations on the filesystem and observe the application behavior
Expected Result: The application should handle errors without crashing and continue functioning correctly.

Title: Verify the application supports Android 5+ and iOS 13+
Preconditions: Application is installed on a device running Android 5+ or iOS 13+
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android 5+
2. Install the application on a device running iOS 13+
Expected Result: The application should run successfully on both Android 5+ and iOS 13+ devices.

Title: Verify timely delivery of project milestones

Test Steps: 1. Ensure all deliverables are submitted before their respective deadlines
Expected Result: All deliverables should be submitted on time.

Title: Verify knowledge of required programming languages and frameworks
Test Steps: 1. Confirm that the development team has knowledge of TypeScript, JSX, Expo, React, Expo Location, etc.
Expected Result: The development team should possess the necessary knowledge to develop the application.

Title: Verify the application requires internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to use the application without an internet connection
2. Observe the application behavior
Expected Result:
The application should not function properly without an internet connection. In the absence of internet, it should display an appropriate message or error. <|user|>

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
The project involves developing an application that integrates with Yelp API to provide location recommendations using a Pathfinder algorithm. The application must have a user-friendly interface, be efficient, and ensure data portability across supported mobile devices. It also requires internet connectivity and adherence to strict non-functional requirements such as reliability and proper uninstallation procedures.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------

Title: Verify the application handles network errors gracefully
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a network failure while the application is running
2. Perform a location search and observe the application behavior
3. Introduce an error in algorithm execution and observe the application behavior
4. Perform operations on the filesystem and observe the application behavior
Expected Result: The application should handle network errors without crashing and continue functioning correctly. It should display an appropriate error message or fallback to a previous state. For algorithm errors, the application should handle them gracefully and provide a user-friendly message or fallback functionality.

Title: Verify the application requires at least 100MB of storage space
Test Steps:
1. Check the available storage space on the device
2. Ensure the available storage space is at least 100MB
3. Attempt to install the application
Expected Result:
The application should not allow installation if the available storage space is less than 100MB. An appropriate error message should be displayed to the user indicating insufficient storage. <|user|>
